caption: A news broadcast features a political meeting where several people are seated at a long white table. A man in a white kurta-pyjama, identified by on-screen text as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," sits on the left, while another man in a white shirt and a woman in a white outfit are seated further down the table. In the background, a man in a dark suit stands. The screen is overlaid with a red and yellow news ticker and a banner that reads "BREAKING NEWS" in large gold letters. The top header reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजसंती की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है," accompanied by the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. A timestamp of "10:08 PM" is visible in the bottom right. As the video progresses, the camera remains stationary, but dynamic on-screen graphics change, including the appearance of small inset portraits of other politicians, such as "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी," on the right side of the screen.
